text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 171 

PHYS_THRPY_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Physical Therapy Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for physical therapy services provided during the 
beneficiary's stay. 

NOTE: Effective with MEDPAR2000 expansion, all amount fields were expanded from S9(7) to S9(9). 

SHORT NAME: PHYTHAMT 

LONG NAME: PHYS_THRPY_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR
